commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a pnpm patch for `@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent@0.74.0` to prune stale pre-compaction SessionManager entries, adds focused regression coverage, updates port diagnostics/tests, adjusts Matrix test helper imports, updates patch metadata, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of the published Pi package shows unbounded live `fileEntries`/`byId` retention, and the PR body includes a real persisted-JSONL terminal run demonstrating after-fix pruning at the compaction boundary.
